items.title: Sources: Liverpool to open talks with Iraola
items.summary: Liverpool are set to open formal talks with Andoni Iraola this week as they work to appoint Arne Slot's successor, sources told ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Swiatek falls as all French singles champs out
items.summary: Marta Kostyuk reached the quarterfinals at the French Open for the first time on Sunday by taking out four-time champion Iga Swiatek.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: How Ginebra, TNT set up Commissioner's Cup Finals ...
items.summary: Ginebra and TNT will once again do battle for top honors in the PBA Season 50 Commissioner's Cup Finals.
